inputs.label: Total Clicks
inputs.businessContext: Total number of unique clicks on links in the email campaign.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of unique clicks on links in the email campaign.
businessContext_i18n.tr: E-posta kampanyasındaki bağlantılara yapılan toplam benzersiz tıklama sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der eindeutigen Klicks auf Links in der E-Mail-Kampagne.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de clics uniques sur les liens dans la campagne email.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de clics únicos en enlaces de la campaña de correo electrónico.

inputs.label: Total Delivered Emails
inputs.businessContext: Total number of emails successfully delivered to recipients' inboxes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of emails successfully delivered to recipients' inboxes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Alıcıların gelen kutularına başarıyla teslim edilen toplam e-posta sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der erfolgreich in den Posteingängen der Empfänger zugestellten E-Mails.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'emails livrés avec succès dans les boîtes de réception des destinataires.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de correos electrónicos entregados con éxito en las bandejas de entrada de los destinatarios.

inputs.label: Total Opens
inputs.businessContext: Total number of times the email was opened (optional, for click-to-open rate).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of times the email was opened (optional, for click-to-open rate).
businessContext_i18n.tr: E-postanın açılma toplam sayısı (isteğe bağlı, tıklama/açılma oranı için).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Öffnungen der E-Mail (optional, für die Klick-zu-Öffnungs-Rate).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de fois où l'email a été ouvert (optionnel, pour le taux de clics par ouverture).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de veces que se abrió el correo electrónico (opcional, para la tasa de clics por apertura).

inputs.label: Total Sent Emails
inputs.businessContext: Total number of emails sent in the campaign.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of emails sent in the campaign.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der in der Kampagne gesendeten E-Mails.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'emails envoyés dans la campagne.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de correos electrónicos enviados en la campaña.

inputs.label: Bounced Emails
inputs.businessContext: Number of emails that were not delivered due to hard or soft bounces.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of emails that were not delivered due to hard or soft bounces.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sert veya yumuşak geri dönüşler nedeniyle teslim edilemeyen e-posta sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der E-Mails, die aufgrund von harten oder weichen Bounces nicht zugestellt wurden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'emails non délivrés en raison de rejets durs ou mous.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de correos electrónicos que no se entregaron debido a rebotes duros o blandos.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
